itemName.zh: Magnum Research “沙漠之鹰”L6 .50 AE手枪
itemName.en: Magnum Research Desert Eagle L6 .50 AE pistol

description.zh:
放松，你几乎完成所有手枪了，但你之前太轻松了！这次可不会是小菜一碟，所以我觉得你应该更认真一点。但是嘿，往好的方面看，现在这些枪大部分都能发射一些合适的弹药了，很酷对吧？嗯，总之……我这里会慷慨一点，清理小队最近从一些倒下的士兵身上搜刮到了这些工具，所以你可以拿去，它们应该还处于不错的状况——弹药不包括在内！

我很想看到你处理这个。不是每个人都能驾驭这类武器，尤其是在这里，它们更难搞到。你觉得你足够胜任这个挑战吗？
description.en:
Relax, you're almost done with all the handguns, but you had it easy before! This won't be a cakewalk, so I think you should take this a little more serious. But hey, look at it from the bright site, most of these guns can shoot some proper ammo now, cool right? Well, anyway... I'll be a little generous here, the cleanup crew scraped off a few of these tools from some fallen fighters recently so you can have them, they should still be in decent condition - Ammo not included!

I'd be eager to see you deal with this. Not everyone is able to handle these kind of weapons, especially around here where they're much harder to get. You think you're fit enough for this challenge?
